lists.title: Lists
lists.emptyDescription: Send the bot a message to start your first list.

items.deleteConfirmDescription: This can be restored from the audit log within 30 days.

settings.title: Settings
settings.modelHelp: Used by the bot for AI responses.
settings.notificationsHelp: Receive a Telegram DM when an item is due.
settings.exportDescription: Get every item, list, activity, and chat message you own as a JSON file.
settings.exportFailed: Couldn't prepare the export — try again.

audit.title: Audit
audit.emptyDescription: Changes to this list will appear here.
audit.ownerOnly: Only the list owner can view the audit log.

marketing.subtitle: A chatty bot that captures and manages your lists. A Mini App for when you want to see them. Bring your own AI key — open source, self-hostable.
marketing.feature1Title: Talk to it like a friend
marketing.feature1Body: Plain Turkish or English — the bot reads intent and creates, edits, completes, schedules, or shares for you.
marketing.feature2Body: Per-list invites by Telegram username. Editors and viewers, no group bots.
marketing.feature3Body: BYOK with OpenRouter — your usage, your bill, your model choice. Encrypted at rest with AES-256-GCM.
marketing.feature4Body: Docker Compose, Postgres, Next.js. Run it on your own Hetzner box in under 15 minutes.
marketing.feature5Body: Mini App inherits Telegram's theme and uses the native MainButton + BackButton. No webview tax.
marketing.feature6Body: Optimistic UI on every action. 5-second polling on shared lists. Snappy regardless of network.
marketing.how1Body: Start a chat with @listbull_bot. The bot creates your Inbox automatically.
marketing.how2Body: Type "süt al" or open the Mini App and tap. Both stay in sync within 5 seconds.
marketing.how3Body: Invite housemates by @username. They get a one-tap accept link in chat.

snapshot.expiredDescription: Ask the owner to share a fresh link.
snapshot.notFoundDescription: The link is invalid or has been revoked.

activity.emptyDescription: Changes to this list will appear here.

share.usernameHint: Without the @, lower-case. They must have started the bot once.

invite.openFromTelegramHint: Tap the bot link in your Telegram chat to sign in, then open this invite again.
invite.wrongAccount: This invite is for someone else

setup.title: Setup
setup.webhookSecretHint: A long random string you keep private.
